label: Homily on the Dormition of the Virgin Mary?

work.desc_title: John of Damascus, Homily on the Dormition of the Virgin Mary
creator: ark:/21198/s18c7m

note: The undertext appears to contain a homily on, or perhaps the narrative of, the dormition of the Virgin Mary from the Bethlehem tradition
Arabic translator: Abba Antonios or ‘Abdallah ibn al-Fadl al-Antaki?

There is a clear divergence between this undertext object and the well-known published versions (cf. Shoemaker 2002). See also, Graf, Geschichte, Vol. 1, pp. 249-251 and his references to Sinai MSS of similar content. Finally, compare Enger 1854, p. 54 with the undertext on fol. 30r

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
